ddls:
CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "milestone_type" TEXT /* Type of milestone (e.g., first player signed, first points scored) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the milestone */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the milestone */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone occurred */,
  "information" TEXT /* Detailed information about the milestone */,
  "milestone_location" TEXT /* Location where the milestone occurred */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the milestone */,
  "milestone_video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video or media related to the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, guard) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game */,
  "game_video_link" TEXT /* Link to the full game video or highlights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* Team the player is transferring from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* Team the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" TEXT /* Amount of money involved in the transfer */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer (e.g., trade, free agency) */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the new contract in years */,
  "contract_value" TEXT /* Total value of the new contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who is injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player returned to play */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "rehabilitation_status" TEXT /* Current status of rehabilitation */,
  "injury_video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video or media related to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team coached */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Coaching record (e.g., win-loss record) */,
  "highest_achievement" TEXT /* Highest achievement as a coach (e.g., championship, playoff appearance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., social media, event attendance) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the level of fan engagement */,
  "interaction_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the interaction occurred (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  "interaction_video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video or media related to the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_stats" (
  "playoff_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the playoff season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player during playoffs */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player during playoffs */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player during playoffs */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the playoffs */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the season ended */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that won the championship */,
  "champion_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team that won the championship */,
  "runner_up_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that was the runner-up */,
  "runner_up_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team that was the runner-up */,
  "top_scorer_player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the top scorer of the season */,
  "top_scorer_player_name" TEXT /* Name of the top scorer of the season */,
  "most_valuable_player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the most valuable player of the season */,
  "most_valuable_player_name" TEXT /* Name of the most valuable player of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_scorer_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_runner_up_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("runner_up_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_most_valuable_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("most_valuable_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the review is about */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review provided by the fan */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan who wrote the review */,
  "fan_email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the fan (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan club */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the fan club represents */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan club */,
  "membership_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the fan club */,
  "club_website" TEXT /* URL of the fan club's website */,
  "club_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the fan club */,
  "club_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the fan club's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_clubs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
